description: A Class C artifact with declared protocol, required_quorum, and eligible_attesters, where the consensus process is open but the required quorum has not yet been reached, MUST receive CONSENSUS_PENDING status.

input.claim: this action received the required approvals

action_policy.reason: Consensus has not reached the required quorum.

why: WiseOrder Protocol v0.1.0 §3 Class C: with required_quorum=2 and only one eligible attestation received, the process is open but the quorum is unmet → CONSENSUS_PENDING. Exercises C1 (rules declared before collection), C4 (quorum semantics preserved as auditable metadata), and AG1 (action_policy.action_allowed remains false even pending consensus).
